series_metadata.series_description: Files on all supplier and liquor permit holders in the State of Ohio containing: the application, investigation questionnaire, all documents required to show proof of eligibility, copies of the permit issued and all renewals issued with the application for the annual renewal.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Permit applications, including Temporary liquor permits are processed through LITS (License Issuance Tracking System) a computerized optical scanning Image System and continually updated. Paper files are kept ensure quality and completeness ; Electronic: Permit applications, including Temporary liquor permits are processed through LITS(License Issuance Tracking System) a computerized optical scanning Image System and continually updated. LITS images are stored forever and
